revision.comment: Initial creation
revision.text:
{afc comment|1=wikidata item [[d:Q135038949]]~~~~} '''Tatano Shrine''' is a [[List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]].
==References== [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing Yamato Province Shikinaisha created pages en masse. Since last edit is a few days ago in this, it should not overwrite any real pages
revision.text:
{afc comment|1=wikidata item [[d:Q135038949]]~~~~} '''Tatano Shrine''' is a [[List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]].
==References== [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]]

revision.comment: I realize that doing a recent edit on these ones is better than all of that other crap of manual cat a lot stuff

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata link templates
Bot: remove incorrect Shona (sn:) interwiki links
Text replacement - "(UTC)}↵" to "(UTC)}} "
tagging these short pages for more work
Text replacement - "[[d:" to "[[da:d:"
Text replacement - "[[Category:1000 shortest pages as of Nov 16, 2025]]" to "[[Category:1000 shortest pages as of Nov 16, 2025]][[Category:qq]]"
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Add Wikidata has short description - based on Wikidata English short description
revision.text:
{afc comment|1=wikidata item [[da:d:Q135038949]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:41, 5 August 2025 (UTC)}} '''Tatano Shrine''' is a [[List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]].
==References== [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]]
{{wikidata link|Q135038949}} [[Category:1000 shortest pages as of Nov 16, 2025]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

revision.comment: Bot: Add Wikidata has English label - based on Wikidata English label
revision.text:

==References== [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]]
{{wikidata link|Q135038949}} [[Category:1000 shortest pages as of Nov 16, 2025]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - " is a [[List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]]." to " is a [[List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]].[[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]]<!--doing this because this is the phrase that indicates earlier autogenerated shrines we want to begin to start updating with new code-->"
revision.text:
{afc comment|1=wikidata item [[da:d:Q135038949]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:41, 5 August 2025 (UTC)}} '''Tatano Shrine''' is a [[List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]].[[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]]<!--doing this because this is the phrase that indicates earlier autogenerated shrines we want to begin to start updating with new code-->
==References== [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]]
{{wikidata link|Q135038949}} [[Category:1000 shortest pages as of Nov 16, 2025]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

== Accidentally Overwritten Content == '''Tatano Shrine''' is a shrine in the Engishiki Jinmyōchō. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].
== Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! District !! Name !! Funding category !! Rank !! Notes !! Same as !! Co-ords !! {{wikidata link|Q135040452}}
